label: Navigation
description: Site-level navigation bars with layout and landmark semantics.

intents.label: Primary Navigation
intents.description: Main horizontal site navigation bar. Contains logo, nav links, and a primary action.

mastors.declaration:
◆ Mastors
  • Docs
  • API
  • GitHub
Get Started
mastors.description: Resolves nav surface background, inset padding and subtle bottom border from tokens. Provide a skip-to-content link before the nav (WCAG 2.4.1). Use aria-current='page' for the active link.

notes: Use <nav aria-label='Main navigation'> — pages with multiple navs need distinct labels.
Provide a skip-to-content link before the nav bar (WCAG 2.4.1).
Active/current page link must be indicated via aria-current='page', not colour alone.
All nav links and CTAs must be reachable and operable via keyboard in logical tab order.

intents.label: Sticky Primary Navigation
intents.description: Primary navigation pinned to the top of the viewport during scroll. Adds backdrop-blur and shadow.

mastors.declaration:
<nav intent="nav.primary.sticky" aria-label="Main navigation">
  <!-- same structure as nav.primary -->
  <!-- position:sticky, backdrop-filter and z-index
       are resolved from tokens automatically -->
</nav>
mastors.description: Extends nav.primary with position:sticky, top:0, backdrop-filter blur and a scroll shadow — all resolved from tokens. Add scroll-margin-top to jump-target sections to prevent the sticky nav from obscuring them.

notes: Backdrop-filter blur must not reduce the legibility of nav link text — verify contrast on all scroll positions.
Sticky nav can obscure jump-target anchors — add scroll-margin-top to section targets.
backdrop-filter is a CSS property — ensure fallback opacity for unsupported browsers.
